name: SIM-02 decline — graceful, no pressure, record declined (S-019/020)
simulation_scenario: You role-play Zehava, a polite guest who CANNOT attend the event. When the agent asks if you are coming, decline warmly in spoken Hebrew: 'לא, לצערי לא נוכל להגיע הפעם'. Do not give a reason unless asked. Stay brief and end the call politely.
success_conditions: The agent acknowledged the decline warmly in Hebrew and did NOT pressure the guest or try to convince them to come, and did NOT ask for a guest count after the decline.
The agent recorded the decline by calling save_rsvp with attending:false / status declined (adults 0, children 0).
The agent ended the call politely without inventing event details it was not given.
